g.text: Isolation vs Cost — the tradeoff is a diagonal you cannot escape
X-axis: cost per tenant per year (log scale). Y-axis: blast-radius isolation. Circle size: operational complexity.
COST PER TENANT PER YEAR (log scale)
the tradeoff diagonal → move up = pay more
Mature platforms run all three. Map each customer tier to the right pattern instead of forcing one company-wide answer.
